title: Gingee Fort
tagline: Gingee Fort — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Gingee Fort or Senji Fort (also known as Chenji, Chanchi, Jinji or Senchi) in Tamil Nadu, India is one of the surviving forts in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Gingee Fort or Senji Fort (also known as Chenji, Chanchi, Jinji or Senchi) in Tamil Nadu, India is one of the surviving forts in Tamil Nadu, India. It is popularly known as Great Wall of South India. It lies in Villupuram District, 160 kilometres (99 mi) from the state capital, Chennai, and is close to the Union Territory of Puducherry. It is ranked as the "most impregnable fortress in India", and was called the "Troy of the East" by the British.

topPlaces.name: Gingee Venkataramana Temple
topPlaces.description: The Gingee Venkataramana Temple, built in the 16th century is the largest temple in Gingee, in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu. It was built by Muthialu Nayakan (Muthyala Nayaka) (1540 - 1550 CE) and dedicated to Venkateshwara.

topPlaces.name: Sirukadambur
topPlaces.description: Sirukadambur is a village in the Sendurai taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Nangilikondan
topPlaces.description: Nangilickondan (also called Nangilickondan) is a village in Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu. It has located between Gingee and Tindivanam road.

items.note: The Gingee Venkataramana Temple, built in the 16th century is the largest temple in Gingee, in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu. It was built by Muthialu Nayakan (Muthyala Nayaka) (1540 - 1550 CE) and dedicated to Venkateshwara.
Sirukadambur is a village in the Sendurai taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Nangilickondan (also called Nangilickondan) is a village in Villupuram district, Tamil Nadu. It has located between Gingee and Tindivanam road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gingee Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gingee Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gingee Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (118 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (133 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gingee Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gingee Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gingee Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Gingee Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gingee Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gingee Venkataramana Temple, Sirukadambur, Nangilikondan.
